title: AdministrativeBoundaryFeatureCollection
description: A standard GeoJSON FeatureCollection of Polygon/MultiPolygon boundaries for one level of Uganda's administrative hierarchy (region, district, and — partially, see docs/DATA_QUALITY.md for coverage caveats — subcounty/town_council/division and parish/ward). Geometry itself follows the GeoJSON spec (RFC 7946) as-is; this schema only constrains the `properties` object each feature carries, which links the polygon back to the corresponding AdministrativeUnit record in dist/uganda-locations.json. Coverage below district level is intentionally partial (subcounty ~57%, parish ~4%) — this file lists only the units a real source's geometry actually matched; consult dist/data-quality-report.json or docs/DATA_QUALITY.md for exact coverage, don't assume completeness.

id.description: Matches the id of the corresponding record in dist/uganda-locations.json (e.g. 'district:mbarara', 'region:western').

level.description: Present on subcounty/parish-tier features (values: 'subcounty', 'town_council', 'division', 'parish', 'ward'), since a single subcounty/parish file mixes tiers. Absent on region/district features, where the file itself is already single-tier.

district_id.description: Present on subcounty/parish-tier features only: the id of the nearest district/city ancestor (walking up through county where applicable), for filtering without a separate lookup.

region_id.description: Present on district-level features; null/absent on region-level features (a region has no parent region).

subregion_id.description: Present on district-level features; the cultural/traditional sub-region, see schema/administrative-unit.schema.json.

source_ids.description: References into data/sources.json. Absent on region-level features, which are derived from the district geometry rather than an independent source — see their 'source' property instead.

source.description: Present on region-level features only: a plain-text note that the geometry was dissolved from district-level features rather than sourced independently.

population.description: Present on district-level features only (null on region-level features). Same shape as the `population` property on AdministrativeUnit records — see schema/administrative-unit.schema.json — merged in at build time for direct choropleth-map use.
